name: Threshold-Filtered Chemical Inventory Data Entry
description: You are the EHS manager for 'Apex Manufacturing'. You need to submit the annual Tier II report. Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. 1. Create a new facility named 'Apex Manufacturing' (Address: 100 Industrial Way, Detroit, MI 48201) if it is not already present. 2. Review the raw chemical inventory data located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\inventory_2025.csv. 3. Apply federal EPCRA Section 312 threshold rules: Non-EHS chemicals must be reported if their Max Amount >= 10,000 lbs. EHS chemicals must be reported if their Max Amount >= 500 lbs OR their TPQ, whichever is LOWER. 4. Enter ONLY the chemicals that meet or exceed their reporting threshold into the Apex Manufacturing inventory in Tier2 Submit. Provide all required details (CAS, Name, EHS status, Physical State, Max/Avg amounts, Hazards, and Storage). DO NOT enter below-threshold chemicals. 5. Once finished, export the submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\apex_filtered.t2s.
